CustomField.formula:
IF( ISPICKVAL( INF_Product_Group__c , 'Personal Applications') , 1, IF( ISPICKVAL( INF_Product_Group__c , 'Signals Notebook') , 2, IF( ISPICKVAL( INF_Product_Group__c , 'E-Notebook') , 3, IF( ISPICKVAL( INF_Product_Group__c , 'CBOE') , 4, IF( ISPICKVAL( INF_Product_Group__c , 'Spotfire') , 5, IF( ISPICKVAL( INF_Product_Group__c , 'Imaging') , 6,99
))))))
CustomField.label: Application Sequence
